title: cyclosorus schaffneri
intro: Cyclosorus schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Cyclosorus schaffneri include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus schaffneri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
